name: Visual Translate by Vozo
tagline: Localize video text overlays into any language without rebuilding your visuals from scratch.
problem: Businesses expanding into new markets must recreate entire video assets just to translate on-screen text, wasting time and design resources. Visual Translate automates the detection and replacement of text within video visuals, preserving the original look and feel. This eliminates the need for motion designers to manually rework localized versions of every video.
useCases: Localizing marketing video campaigns for international audiences
Translating product demo or tutorial videos for new regional markets
Adapting social media video content with text overlays into multiple languages
Updating e-learning or training videos with translated on-screen text
